title: Canada First Adult Passport Application (Form PPTC 153)
description: Apply for a first Canadian adult passport (or an adult passport a person is not eligible to renew using the Simplified Renewal process, e.g. after a name change), using the data model of Form PPTC 153 (Adult General Passport Application) for Canadians 16 or older applying in Canada or the USA. Requires a guarantor (a Canadian passport-holder who has known the applicant personally for at least two years) to validate identity and certify a photo, two references, and a mandatory emergency contact. Fee varies by validity period (5-year or 10-year) and is adjusted annually; see the live source. It does not submit the application; the live Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada (Passport Program) source is always authoritative (see VERIFICATION.md). Sibling to ca/ircc/passport-renewal-simplified, the fallback path for applicants who cannot use that simpler renewal.

authority.name: Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada, Passport Program

verification.notes: Source-derived reference schema transcribed field-by-field from the live Form PPTC 153 PDF at canada.ca (fetched directly, no access block). All 8 pages (the 9-section application form plus the full Instructions A-P) extracted as clean, legible text and transcribed field-by-field from that output. Not a time-versioned/edition form: a first passport application is a one-time filing per document, not filed 'for' a recurring period (the form itself must simply be signed within the preceding 12 months), so it is authored at the plain (non-edition) registry path per the GSP-0005 §2 coexistence test. Status remains 'draft' pending full independent field-by-field source review. See VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: surnameForPassport
fields.label: Surname (last name) requested to appear in the passport
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. If different from the name on the proof of citizenship (e.g. after a marriage or legal name change), additional documentation is required (see section I of the instructions).

fields.name: givenNamesForPassport
fields.label: Given name(s) requested to appear in the passport
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: allFormerSurnames
fields.label: All former surnames (including surname at birth, if different)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Separate multiple former surnames by a comma. These will not appear in the passport.

fields.name: parentsSurnamesAtBirth
fields.label: Surname of parent(s) at their birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Enter one or both parents' surname(s) at birth; if unknown, enter "unknown".

fields.name: anticipatedTravelDateUnknown
fields.label: Anticipated date of travel — unknown
fields.description: Check if the travel date is not yet known. If false, give anticipatedTravelMonthDay. Regardless of the date given, it is recommended not to finalize travel plans until the passport is received.

fields.name: anticipatedTravelMonthDay
fields.label: Anticipated date of travel (month/day)
fields.description: The form collects only month and day, no year, e.g. "08-15". Required when anticipatedTravelDateUnknown is false.

fields.name: placeOfBirthCity
fields.label: Applicant's place of birth — city
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required on the application form; a separate Form PPTC 077 requests omitting the place of birth from the printed passport itself, out of scope here.

fields.name: placeOfBirthCountry
fields.label: Applicant's place of birth — country or territory
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: placeOfBirthProvinceOrState
fields.label: Applicant's place of birth — province/territory/state
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. If applicable.

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. YYYY-MM-DD. If the proof of citizenship does not show a complete date of birth, the date as shown on the supporting identification (section 5) is entered instead.

fields.name: sex
fields.label: Sex/gender identifier to appear in the passport
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. F = Female, M = Male, X = Another gender. If this does not match the submitted proof of citizenship or latest travel document, a separate Form PPTC 643 is also required (out of scope here).

fields.name: naturalEyeColour
fields.label: Natural eye colour
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: height
fields.label: Height (cm or in)
fields.description: Free text, including the unit, e.g. "175 cm" or "5 ft 9 in".

fields.name: currentHomeAddressLine1
fields.label: Current home address — number and street
fields.description: Must be a physical address.

fields.name: currentHomeAddressApt
fields.label: Current home address — apartment
fields.description: If applicable.

fields.name: currentHomeAddressCity
fields.label: Current home address — city
fields.description: City component of the address.

fields.name: currentHomeAddressProvinceOrState
fields.label: Current home address — province/territory/state
fields.description: Province/territory or state component of the address.

fields.name: currentHomeAddressPostalCode
fields.label: Current home address — postal/ZIP code
fields.description: Postal or ZIP code component of the address.

fields.name: mailingAddressLine1
fields.label: Mailing address, if different from current home address
fields.description: The passport is delivered to the mailing address given here (or, if not given, the current home address). If the address changes within 30 days of submission, the Passport Program must be notified.

fields.name: mailingAddressApt
fields.label: Mailing address — apartment
fields.description: If applicable.

fields.name: mailingAddressCity
fields.label: Mailing address — city
fields.description: Required when mailingAddressLine1 is given.

fields.name: mailingAddressProvinceOrState
fields.label: Mailing address — province/territory/state
fields.description: Required when mailingAddressLine1 is given.

fields.name: mailingAddressPostalCode
fields.label: Mailing address — postal/ZIP code
fields.description: Required when mailingAddressLine1 is given.

fields.name: email
fields.label: Email address
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Used to contact the applicant and to check application status online. Sent over an unsecured connection per the form's own note.

fields.name: primaryPhoneNumber
fields.label: Telephone (primary)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. In international E.164 format, e.g. +18005676868.

fields.name: otherPhoneNumber
fields.label: Telephone (other)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. In international E.164 format.

fields.name: applicantSignatureDate
fields.label: Date of applicant's signature (page 1 declaration)
fields.description: YYYY-MM-DD. By signing, the applicant declares Canadian citizenship, that the enclosed photos are original/unaltered/a true likeness, and that all statements and supporting documents are true. Must be signed within the last 12 months, on all three application pages.

fields.name: applicantSignedAtCity
fields.label: Signed at — city
fields.description: City component of the address.

fields.name: applicantSignedAtProvinceOrState
fields.label: Signed at — province/territory/state
fields.description: Province/territory or state component of the address.

fields.name: guarantorSurname
fields.label: Guarantor's surname (as in their own passport)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. The guarantor must be a Canadian citizen 18+ who has held a valid (or expired ≤1 year) Canadian passport, was 16+ when that passport was issued, and has known the applicant personally for at least 2 years.

fields.name: guarantorGivenNames
fields.label: Guarantor's given name(s)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: guarantorDateOfBirth
fields.label: Guarantor's date of birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: guarantorPassportNumber
fields.label: Guarantor's Canadian passport number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: guarantorPassportIssueDate
fields.label: Guarantor's passport — date of issue
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: guarantorPassportExpiryDate
fields.label: Guarantor's passport — date of expiry
fields.description: The passport must be valid, or expired for no more than 1 year, on the date the application is received.

fields.name: guarantorRelationshipToApplicant
fields.label: Guarantor's relationship to the applicant
fields.description: The guarantor may be a relative or anyone meeting the eligibility criteria; does not need to reside in the same country as the applicant.

fields.name: guarantorPrimaryPhoneNumber
fields.label: Guarantor's telephone (primary)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. In international E.164 format.

fields.name: guarantorOtherPhoneNumber
fields.label: Guarantor's telephone (other)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. In international E.164 format.

fields.name: guarantorAddressLine1
fields.label: Guarantor's current home address — number and street
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: guarantorAddressApt
fields.label: Guarantor's current home address — apartment
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. If applicable.

fields.name: guarantorAddressCity
fields.label: Guarantor's current home address — city
fields.description: City component of the address.

fields.name: guarantorAddressProvinceOrState
fields.label: Guarantor's current home address — province/territory/state
fields.description: Province/territory or state component of the address.

fields.name: guarantorAddressPostalCode
fields.label: Guarantor's current home address — postal/ZIP code
fields.description: Postal or ZIP code component of the address.

fields.name: guarantorYearsKnown
fields.label: Number of years the guarantor has known the applicant
fields.description: Must be at least 2. If no eligible guarantor has been known for 2+ years, Form PPTC 132 (Statutory Declaration in Lieu of Guarantor) is used instead — out of scope here.

fields.name: guarantorSignatureDate
fields.label: Date of guarantor's signature
fields.description: By signing, the guarantor declares having known the applicant personally for at least 2 years, having signed one photo as a true likeness, and having validated identity documents where applicable.

fields.name: guarantorSignedAtCity
fields.label: Guarantor signed at — city
fields.description: City component of the address.

fields.name: guarantorSignedAtProvinceOrState
fields.label: Guarantor signed at — province/territory/state
fields.description: Province/territory or state component of the address.

fields.name: hasPreviousCanadianTravelDocument
fields.label: Has a Canadian travel document ever been issued to you, in your current name or any other name?
fields.description: A Canadian travel document is a passport, certificate of identity, or refugee travel document. If true, also give previousDocumentNumber and previousDocumentIssueDate, and enclose the document with the application if it has not expired.

fields.name: previousDocumentNumber
fields.label: Previous Canadian travel document number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required when hasPreviousCanadianTravelDocument is true.

fields.name: previousDocumentIssueDate
fields.label: Previous Canadian travel document — date of issue
fields.description: Required when hasPreviousCanadianTravelDocument is true.

fields.name: previousDocumentReturnPreference
fields.label: Would you like the previous passport returned to you?
fields.description: Applicable when hasPreviousCanadianTravelDocument is true and the document is being submitted. If neither option is selected on the form, the passport is not returned and is securely destroyed.

fields.name: bornInCanada
fields.label: Were you born in Canada?
fields.description: Determines which proof-of-citizenship document type applies: born in Canada uses citizenshipDocumentTypeBornInCanada; born outside Canada uses citizenshipDocumentTypeBornAbroad.

fields.name: citizenshipDocumentTypeBornInCanada
fields.label: Proof of citizenship document type (born in Canada)
fields.description: Required when bornInCanada is true. A Canadian provincial/territorial birth certificate does not qualify if, at birth, a parent was employed in Canada by a foreign government/international agency and neither parent was a Canadian citizen or permanent resident.

fields.name: citizenshipDocumentTypeBornAbroad
fields.label: Proof of citizenship document type (born outside Canada)
fields.description: Required when bornInCanada is false.

fields.name: citizenshipDocumentNumber
fields.label: Proof of citizenship — certificate/registration number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: citizenshipDocumentIssueDate
fields.label: Proof of citizenship — date of issue or effective date of citizenship
fields.description: For a citizenship certificate, the date of issue; for a birth certificate, the effective date of citizenship (i.e. date of birth).

fields.name: identityDocumentType
fields.label: Identity document type
fields.description: At least one valid, government-issued (federal/provincial/territorial or local equivalent abroad) identity document with name, date of birth, photo, and signature is required, distinct from the proof of citizenship in section 4. The form provides two rows for combining documents; this document models the first (primary) document only.

fields.name: identityDocumentNumber
fields.label: Identity document number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: identityDocumentExpiryDate
fields.label: Identity document — date of expiry, if applicable
fields.description: If the document has an expiry date.

fields.name: identityDocumentNameOnDocument
fields.label: Applicant's name as it appears on the identity document
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: passportValidityPeriod
fields.label: Period of validity
fields.description: Choose one. Fee varies by period and is adjusted annually; see the live source for current amounts.

fields.name: reference1FullName
fields.label: Reference 1 — full name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. The form requires exactly two references who are not relatives or the guarantor, are 18+, and have known the applicant for at least 2 years, and consent to being contacted to confirm identity.

fields.name: reference1RelationshipToApplicant
fields.label: Reference 1 — relationship to the applicant
fields.description: Must not be a relative or the guarantor.

fields.name: reference1YearsKnown
fields.label: Reference 1 — number of years known
fields.description: Must be at least 2.

fields.name: reference1PhoneNumber
fields.label: Reference 1 — telephone (primary)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. In international E.164 format.

fields.name: reference1OtherPhoneNumber
fields.label: Reference 1 — telephone (other)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. In international E.164 format.

fields.name: reference1Email
fields.label: Reference 1 — email address
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: reference1AddressLine1
fields.label: Reference 1 — address — number and street
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Unlike the applicant and guarantor, references are not assumed to be domestic; the form provides a distinct country/territory field.

fields.name: reference1AddressApt
fields.label: Reference 1 — address — apartment
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. If applicable.

fields.name: reference1AddressCity
fields.label: Reference 1 — address — city
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: reference1AddressProvinceOrState
fields.label: Reference 1 — address — province/territory/state
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. If applicable.

fields.name: reference1AddressCountry
fields.label: Reference 1 — address — country or territory
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: reference1AddressPostalCode
fields.label: Reference 1 — address — postal/ZIP code
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: reference2FullName
fields.label: Reference 2 — full name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Same eligibility criteria as reference1.

fields.name: reference2RelationshipToApplicant
fields.label: Reference 2 — relationship to the applicant
fields.description: Must not be a relative or the guarantor.

fields.name: reference2YearsKnown
fields.label: Reference 2 — number of years known
fields.description: Must be at least 2.

fields.name: reference2PhoneNumber
fields.label: Reference 2 — telephone (primary)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. In international E.164 format.

fields.name: reference2OtherPhoneNumber
fields.label: Reference 2 — telephone (other)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. In international E.164 format.

fields.name: reference2Email
fields.label: Reference 2 — email address
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: reference2AddressLine1
fields.label: Reference 2 — address — number and street
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Same eligibility criteria as reference1; references are not assumed to be domestic.

fields.name: reference2AddressApt
fields.label: Reference 2 — address — apartment
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. If applicable.

fields.name: reference2AddressCity
fields.label: Reference 2 — address — city
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: reference2AddressProvinceOrState
fields.label: Reference 2 — address — province/territory/state
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. If applicable.

fields.name: reference2AddressCountry
fields.label: Reference 2 — address — country or territory
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: reference2AddressPostalCode
fields.label: Reference 2 — address — postal/ZIP code
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: emergencyContactFullName
fields.label: Emergency contact — full name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Mandatory section, used if the applicant requires emergency assistance while outside Canada.

fields.name: emergencyContactRelationshipToApplicant
fields.label: Emergency contact — relationship to the applicant
fields.description: E.g. spouse, parent, sibling, friend.

fields.name: emergencyContactPhoneNumber
fields.label: Emergency contact — telephone (primary)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. In international E.164 format.

fields.name: emergencyContactOtherPhoneNumber
fields.label: Emergency contact — telephone (other)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. In international E.164 format.

fields.name: emergencyContactEmail
fields.label: Emergency contact — email address
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: emergencyContactAddressLine1
fields.label: Emergency contact — current home address — number and street
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Unlike section 8 (references), this section does not have a separate country/territory field on the form.

fields.name: emergencyContactAddressApt
fields.label: Emergency contact — current home address — apartment
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. If applicable.

fields.name: emergencyContactAddressCity
fields.label: Emergency contact — current home address — city
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: emergencyContactAddressProvinceOrState
fields.label: Emergency contact — current home address — province/territory/state
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. If applicable.

fields.name: emergencyContactAddressPostalCode
fields.label: Emergency contact — current home address — postal/ZIP code
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

steps.title: Proof of citizenship and identity documents
